title: stapfiophyton tetrandrum
side_effects: Stapfiophyton tetrandrum can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues in some individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant's extracts may lead to more severe side effects, including liver damage and cardiovascular problems. In rare cases, improper use of Stapfiophyton tetrandrum has been linked to seizures, coma, and even death. It is essential to consult with a qualified healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to minimize the risk of adverse reactions.
